title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: LAKE OSWEGO PUBLIC LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily during the winter season. Provides access to Wi-Fi, computers, and public bathrooms. 706 4th Street Lake Oswego, OR 97034 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-7pm, Friday-Saturday 10am-5pm, Sunday 1pm-5pm (503) 636-7628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 636-7628 Main phone Main phone (503) 636-7628 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet lines 35 and 36 Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAKE OSWEGO PUBLIC LIBRARY
